description: Marriage contract, fragmentary and damaged, in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe, in the later period of his activity as scribe (dated documents: 1100-1138), in which an Indian female slave worth 20 dinars formed part of a dowry worth 83 dinars (including marriage payments, not preserved). (Information from Mediterranean Society, IV, pp. 325, 326, 456)
tags: Marriage, slaves, Halfon b. Menashshe, ketubba
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
